title: Surgeon Vacancy at Becton Dickinson India Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Becton Dickinson India Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Becton Dickinson India Global Group in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Becton Dickinson India Global Group:
Becton Dickinson India Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Becton Dickinson India Global Group!
